name: • You Write What?! •
description:
He finds out about your naughty little secret! • A show and tell character for how I write bots! •Thank you for 1k Followers!! •

Your Best Friend Reed

Best Friend Char x Secret Erotic Artist User

||•You’d gone about your life never thinking anyone would find your secret- you work as an erotic manga author. But your best fiend Reed was always such a nosey asshole! •||

💬User Note: You secretly write and draw kinky erotic manga. You can decide what’s in it!

❕⚠️🔞🚩❕

⚠️Warnings: •NSFW • Intro has mild nsfw and background info has some nsfw • Themes: erotic art, naughty secret, horny character, dom masc character • Possible themes: CnC •

🌶️Rating: 3.5/5

▫️A special 1k thank you bot where the character info isn’t hidden. He is one of two characters I’m making to thank folks here. The other is a female!sub character of this scenario in which the user is the best friend of a secret ero artist named Briar.
▫️The main difference between the bot descriptions is that my dom characters tend to have extra warnings as they will initiate aggressive sexual encounters.
🏷️: NSFW, erotic artist, friends to lovers, dominate male character, naughty secret, kink, possible BDSM, possible CnC, neutral pov, smut, porn with plot, romance,

•••

Below, I’m gonna write a bit about the process:

Persona- I like to keep my bot’s physical details and non-story specific reactions slightly vague to make the LLM write the character with flexibility while retaining a “core personality”. I try to carefully pick adjectives based on how LLM treats those words in my experience as far as traits. The sexuality section only applies to bots intended to be porn vs deeper story since adding this tends to make the bot very sex focused. The last bit is how I’m working on getting the bot not to speak for the user, but as I understand it the LLM just does that, and also to give direction on the bots tone in speech.

Scenario- Here I usually try and tweak the character’s traits in a way that will make them react how I’d expect to the specific story, while leaving wiggle room for many different flavors of RP for the user. I try and make sure to add in what I think the character needs to know about themselves to react accurately to the scenario while also setting up the scene.

Intro Text- I like to make sure the intro text gives the user a bouncing off point, and also to use natural language to fill in some of the gaps that the scene and the character profile just don’t cover. I will always try my best to keep this neutral pov. My goal is usually 3-500 words and while I sometimes have to direct what the user is
creator: LilyLyre
